s3.storagelens.CfnAbout: The AWS::S3::StorageLens resource creates an Amazon S3 Storage Lens configuration.

s3.storagelens.StorageLensConfiguration.Description: This resource contains the details Amazon S3 Storage Lens configuration.

s3.storagelens.Tags.Description: A set of tags (key–value pairs) to associate with the Storage Lens configuration.
